column2: only 2 of 4 POIs generatable: Places returns no usable photos for any shopping-dining or culture-architecture POI (selfies, night shots, group photos, out-of-town results); cannot confidently name 2 more real walkable POIs
Google Places has no coverage of Anliu town (Wuhua County, Meizhou); all queries return empty or distant-city results and no real walkable POIs can be named with confidence

record lat/lng (33.86,35.53) points to Beirut Lebanon not Bei an China; Google Places has no coverage of Bei an (Heilongjiang) - all queries return empty or Mudanjiang results 600km away; cannot confidently name 4 real walkable POIs
no verifiable shopping-dining POI: Places returned zero results for all mall/market/pedestrian-street queries in Honggang District, Daqing; 3/4 categories uploaded

Google Places has almost no coverage of Warder (Somali Region, Ethiopia): town-centre photos are drone shots or unsuitable dirt-street snapshots, mosque photo is an indoor portrait of a person, and market query returned a place in Ohio USA; cannot confidently name 4 real walkable POIs

Google Places has no coverage at Budta geonames point (7.204,124.440) in rural Maguindanao del Sur; nearest market/mosque results are 10-30km away in Midsayap, Cotabato City, or Sultan Kudarat and cannot be confirmed walkable from this neighborhood
